title: New Pages – UI Shell
key_decisions: API returns snake_case DB column names; introduced DbProductListRow, DbBatchRow, DbMappingRow typed interfaces to match raw API responses
Existing camelCase types (CanonicalProductSku, ProductImportBatch, etc.) are preserved for internal logic; snake_case types are used only for API boundary
ProductDatabasePage has three tabs: All Products, Review Queue, Import Batches with a slide-over product detail drawer
ProductResolutionPage has two tabs: Resolution Queue and Mapping Lookup
Both pages are wired into AdminDashboard.tsx as Data Intelligence sub-tabs (database, resolution)
Visual direction combines investor deck warmth with admin table density via amber/slate palette
notes: Pre-existing TS errors in UGCOfferPage, IntelligenceBookingVisual, actionLogger are not introduced by this milestone
